◎译　　名　夜半门开 / Ghost Walk

◎年　　代　2018

　　　　　  甘素贤 So-Hyun Gam

◎简　　介  

　　Hye-jeong works in a factory on the outskirts of the city. All she wants is to live alone in peace. One night, however, she finds she has become a ghost. As a ghost, she goes back in time, day by day, and tries to keep out of harm’s way.
introduction: Hye-jeong works in a factory on the outskirts of the city. All she wants is to live alone in peace. One night, however, she finds she has become a ghost. As a ghost, she goes back in time, day by day, and tries to keep out of harm’s way.
